command: export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/router/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="router" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="WINTEST" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="jwh5zl" && export AGENT_CYCLE="1" && source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh && agent_log_init && agent_log_event "read-review" '{"file":".gitban/agents/reviewer/inbox/WINTEST-jwh5zl-reviewer-1.md","verdict":"REJECTION"}' 2>&1

mkdir -p C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping/.gitban/agents/router/logs && LOGFILE="C:/Users/Cameron/Projects/peon-ping/.gitban/agents/router/logs/WINTEST-1dnbzv-router-1.jsonl" && TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) && echo "{\"event\":\"init\",\"role\":\"router\",\"sprint\":\"WINTEST\",\"card\":\"1dnbzv\",\"cycle\":1,\"ts\":\"$TS\"}" > "$LOGFILE" && echo "{\"event\":\"read-review\",\"file\":\".gitban/agents/reviewer/inbox/WINTEST-1dnbzv-reviewer-1.md\",\"verdict\":\"APPROVAL\",\"ts\":\"$TS\"}" >> "$LOGFILE" && echo "{\"event\":\"write-executor-inbox\",\"file\":\".gitban/agents/executor/inbox/WINTEST-1dnbzv-executor-1.md\",\"ts\":\"$TS\"}" >> "$LOGFILE" && echo "{\"event\":\"card-update\",\"action\":\"append\",\"card\":\"1dnbzv\",\"ts\":\"$TS\"}" >> "$LOGFILE" && echo "{\"event\":\"summary\",\"verdict\":\"APPROVAL\",\"blockers\":0,\"closeout_items\":2,\"planner_cards\":0,\"ts\":\"$TS\"}" >> "$LOGFILE" && echo "Profiling log written to $LOGFILE"
